title: LDKZ official mods
description: these are the mods that are used in an smp and you can use them to recreate that smp, it ads things such as origins/ origins tweaks as well as vanilla plus mods this is reccomended for multiplayer however.
body:
Origins & Origins Tweaks: This mod allows players to choose from a variety of unique origins, each with distinct abilities and traits:
•	Endarian: Venture into a separate dimension where you can explore freely, but beware—returning to your original location is a must! You can throw ender pearls on cooldown and dodge small projectiles, but water is your enemy unless you have the water protection enchantment.
•	Arachnid: Climb walls and shoot grappling hooks made of webs! Standing at 1.5 blocks tall, you can squeeze through one-block gaps while crouching. Just remember, you’re a carnivore, so meat is your main food source.
•	Shulk: Enjoy 9 additional inventory slots and enhanced defense. You can break stone without a pickaxe, but watch out—you'll lose hunger faster than others.
•	Elytrian: Soar through the skies without an elytra, dealing extra damage while flying. However, be cautious of small spaces, as they can be dangerous, and you’ll take increased damage when airborne.
•	Merling: Breathe underwater and break blocks as quickly as players do on land! Craft tridents and summon a rain cloud when out of water, but remember—you cannot leave the water.
•	Feline: Unleash the power of stealth! Deal damage equivalent to a stone sword when your hands are empty, gain extra hunger from food, and scare creepers away. Your footsteps are silent, but you’ll have one less heart and mine stone 50% slower.
•	Blazeborn: Start your journey in the Nether! Set yourself on fire to ignite furnaces and brewing stands, levitate, and shoot fireballs. While on fire, you deal more damage, but touching water is not an option.
•	Avian: Master the bow with increased damage and float gently to the ground. Enjoy a speed boost and wake up to find an egg! Just remember, you’re a vegetarian, so no meat for you, and your bed must be placed at an altitude of at least 86 blocks.





This modpack is designed to enhance your multiplayer experience by allowing you to use both origin and origin tweaks to give the origins special abilities that are:
Allows endarian to go into separate dimension in which they are able to travel around however when they end it they get teleported back to where they were at the start, it also allows them to throw enderpearls on a cooldown as well as dodging small projectiles on cooldown however you can not touch water without the water protection enchant.
Allows Arachnid to climb walls, shoot grapple hooks made of webs, it is also 1.5 blocks tall allowing it to fit in one block gaps when crouching however they are carnivores meaning they have to eat meat.
Allows Shulk to have 9 more slots, stronger defense and can break stone without a pickaxe however you lose food faster.
Allows elytrian to fly without elytra and deal more damage when flying however they cant be in small areas and take more damage from flying.
Allows Merling to breath underwater, break blocks as fast as people can on land underwater, they can craft tridents and summon a rain cloud when out of water however they can not go out of water.
Allows feline to deal the amount of damage a stone sword does when their hands are empty, gain more hunger from eating food, creepers run away from them and their footsteps cant be heard however they have one less heart and mine stone 50% slower.
Allows blazeborn to start in the nether, burn themselves on fire starting furnaces and brewing stands it also allows them to levitate, they can shoot fireballs and when on actual fire they deal more damage however they cant touch the water.
Allows Avian to deal more damage with a bow, float down slowly, run a bit faster and when you wake up you get an egg however you are a vegetarian meaning you cant eat meat and your bed must be at least an altitude of 86 blocks.
It includes a variety of carefully curated mods that add unique features and improvements, making your gameplay both exciting and seamless.
Key Features:
•	Origins & Origins Tweaks: Choose from various origins with reworked abilities, adding depth and diversity to your character.
•	Very Many Players (Fabric): Optimizes server performance for high player counts, ensuring smooth gameplay for everyone.
•	Amendments: Introduces numerous changes to vanilla blocks, enhancing your building options and creativity.
•	Comforts: Adds sleeping bags and hammocks for portability and quick day-night transitions, available in 16 different colors.
•	Simple Voice Chat: Enables easy communication with friends in-game, enhancing your multiplayer experience.
•	Lithium: A no-compromises optimization mod that improves game logic and server performance without sacrificing gameplay quality.
•	Just Mob Heads: Adds a configurable chance for mobs to drop their heads using only vanilla resources.
•	Just Player Heads: Allows players to collect heads via commands or upon death, adding a fun collectible aspect to the game.
Why Download?
This modpack is perfect for friends and communities looking to explore a unique and engaging world together. With a variety of features that enhance gameplay and communication, you'll have endless adventures waiting for you!
